title: Sample Social Posts
intro: These branded post concepts show how CalmCove communicates stress awareness, emotional support, and clear action in a visually consistent way.

posts.title: 3 Signs Your Brain Needs a Reset
posts.caption: Your brain is not lazy. It is overloaded. Here are three signs it may be asking for a reset before you push harder.
posts.cta: Save this for your next study break
posts.visualAlt: Social post visual for 3 signs your brain needs a reset.

posts.title: Stress Spike? Do This.
posts.caption: A 60-second grounding reset can change the next hour of your day. Pause, breathe, and come back softer.
posts.visualAlt: Social post visual for a quick stress reset.

posts.title: Join the 7 Day Calm Challenge
posts.caption: Seven days. Seven tiny reset moments. Build a calmer routine without changing your whole life.
posts.visualAlt: Social post visual promoting the CalmCove challenge.

posts.title: 10 Minute Reset and Focus
posts.caption: This is your between-tasks routine: breathe, soften your shoulders, then step back into focus with more clarity.
posts.visualAlt: Social post visual for a 10 minute reset and focus session.

posts.title: Night Reset
posts.caption: End the day gently. CalmCove helps you move from overstimulated to exhale mode in a few guided minutes.
posts.visualAlt: Social post visual for an evening calm routine.

posts.title: Start Your Free Trial
posts.caption: A calmer day can start in minutes. Explore guided resets, focus sessions, and daily wellness tools for free.
posts.visualAlt: Social post visual encouraging free trial signup.
